displayTitle: Luke Skywalker: The Journey of a Jedi
synopsis: Discover the amazing journey of Luke Skywalker from Tatooine farmboy to Jedi Knight: Watch Luke receive his lightsaber, fly his X-wing down the Death Star trench, and face the Emperor and Darth Vader! Plus, learn fun facts about X-wings, TIE fighters, and more!
title: Luke Skywalker: The Journey of a Jedi
